commit.subject: Revert "LU-18986 mgc: client part of new registration protocol"
commit.message:
Revert "LU-18986 mgc: client part of new registration protocol"

This reverts commit e9c290e7dd2e8c8ad45d9cedf0683e29b321e929.
This was causing lustre-initialization failures like:

 mount.lustre: mount /dev/xxx at /mnt/lustre-ost1 failed: Invalid argument

Change-Id: I91373008c205d03e043e723ac5574336cac6d45a
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=conf-sanity env=ONLY=56
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
